calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Property
Off Calendar Dec-19-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance: Christina Gallagher appeared via zoom for and with Brad Smith (petitioner).

Discussion was held regarding any possible heirs to Mr. Shinohara's trust, Mr. Smith stated that he had an older sister in a nursing home, and that he never mentioned having any nephew or nieces. The matter is taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Ng. Not reported.
